event: The Wine of Saint Martin's Day
description: An enormous crowd of peasant figures presses around a large wagon or cart laden with wine barrels in a brown autumn landscape. The scene is chaotic — figures jostle, climb over each other, reach for wine, drink from flagons and jugs, and collapse on the ground. Some figures ride on horseback at the edges. The crowd fills nearly the entire canvas, with hundreds of small figures rendered in earthy browns, reds, and whites. The sky is muted and overcast. The overall impression is of a massive, unruly folk celebration centered on wine consumption.

_meta.title: The Wine of Saint Martin's Day
